**Body:**

Dear [Customer Name],

[Verify Account Details](https://www.yourbank.com/verify)

Please note that this link is secure and encrypted. If you did not request this verification, please disregard this email or contact our Customer Support team immediately.

Should you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to reach out to us at support@yourbank.com or call our helpline at 1-800-XXX-XXXX.

Thank you for your cooperation in helping us maintain the security of your account.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Bank Name]  
[Bank Contact Information]

---
